Filled : Empty :: Up : __ Filled to Empty is opposite. Up to Down is opposite.

In a non-leap year, the 100th day falls in: ? Jan=31, Feb=28, Mar=31. 31+28=59. 100-59=41. 41-31(Mar)=10. → April 10.

Total from Jan 2 to Jul 4 = 31+28+31+30+31+30+3 = 184 days. Total from Jan 1: 183 days have passed after Jan 1. So it's the 184th day. 184 mod 7 = 184 - 26×7 = 184-182 = 2. Sunday + 2 = Tuesday? February 2100 has how many days? 2100 ÷ 100 = 21 (century year). 2100 ÷ 400 = 5.25 (NOT divisible). Not a leap year.

If today is Tuesday, 3rd, what day is the 17th of the same month? 17-3=14 days later. 14 mod 7 = 0. Same day.

What day of the week is December 25, if January 1 of that year (non-leap) is a Friday? Jan 1 = Friday. Dec 25 = day 359. (359-1) = 358 days after Friday. 358 mod 7 = 358-51×7 = 358-357 = 1. Friday + 1 = Saturday.

Usually: birth year (1st), +4, +8, +12, +16 (5th). But: some 4-year intervals skip (e.g., 1896→1904 skips 1900). Approximately: 16 years (could be more if century year is skipped).

A government year budget runs from April 1 to March 31. If April 1 is a Monday, what day is March 31 (end of year)? In non-leap year: 365 days. 365 mod 7 = 1. Monday + 1 = Tuesday.
